title: Nakano Nino Sky Overlay
description: Resource pack adds Nakano Nino Sky Overlay | PvP | Anime
body:
![main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21d14cd6dd9fb5bf97f366e46785bea022058038.png)
# This resource pack replaces the sky we're used to with a dark pink sky featuring the character Nakano Nino.
- The sky is clearly visible regardless of the time of day (no display issues during the day)
- Version: 1.16.5-26.1.2 
- For the resource pack to work properly, you need to install Optifine. (Forge)

## For sky overlays to work correctly on Fabric, you will need the following mods:
1. [Nuit](https://modrinth.com/project/YBz7DOs8)
2. [Skyboxify](https://modrinth.com/project/DWuwk8aA)

## If you encounter problems:
- Check if "Custom Sky" is enabled in your graphics settings.
- Check other included resource packs, they might be interfering.
